title: [CI:BUILD] RPM: Fix koji and ELN issues
body:
- build dnsname the old way otherwise it fails on koji
- use the binary path for go-md2man for successful ELN builds

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]". That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name. Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->

comments.body:
eln builds were failing before the go-md2man change: https://copr.fedorainfracloud.org/coprs/rhcontainerbot/podman-next/build/6122798/

successful builds with the change:
eln: https://koji.fedoraproject.org/koji/taskinfo?taskID=102709390
rawhide: https://koji.fedoraproject.org/koji/taskinfo?taskID=102709387
would be good to have this in v4.6 before rc1. but not a blocker. I'm not sure yet if packit can do pre-releases, so might have to be a manual task.
aarch64 builds are taking longer because of copr infra issues. We can ignore those for now.
